wikitext.*: {{Infobox Team|isrenamed=Infernum Gaming |name= Absolute |orgcountry= Australia |country= |region= OCE |image=ABS logo.png |coaches= Chris "'''Mattress'''" Manolis |manager= Linda David |captain= |website= |youtube= |facebook= |twitter= AbsoluteOCE |sponsor= |created= 2015-01-25 |disbanded= 2015-10-19 |trades= }}{{TOCRWI|2}} '''Absolute''' was previously a professional League of Legends team based in Australia, formed in 2015. In October 2015, they renamed to '''[[Infernum Gaming]]'''. == History == ===2015 Season=== '''Absolute''' was formed early on in the season, and played in the [[2015 Oceanic Open Ladder Split 1|Oceanic Open Ladder Split 1]], finishing in 7th place, with the top 8 teams moving onto the [[2015 Oceanic Challenger Series Split 1|Oceanic Challenger Series Split 1]]. The team finished in 1st place, defeating [[Best Players Ocean]] in the grand final and securing the team a spot in [[OPL/2015 Season/Split 2|OPL Split 2]]. They placed 6th in the split, with a 5-9 record, forcing them into the [[OPL/2016 Season/Split 1 Promotion|promotion tournament]]. There, they defeated [[AlterEgo Gaming]] 3-0 and re-qualified for the [[OPL/2016 Season/Split 1|2016 OPL]]. ===2016 Preseason=== In October 2015, the team renamed to [[Infernum Gaming]]. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} == Player League Participation == {{TeamPlayerLeagueHistory}} ==Organization== ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position !Next Team {{listplayer|Mallek|au|Lawrence David|'''Owner'''|newteam= Infernum Gaming}} {{listplayersp||au|Linda David|'''Manager'''|newteam= Infernum Gaming}} {{listplayersp|Mattress|au|Chris Manolis|'''Coach'''|newteam= Infernum Gaming}} {{listplayersp|Cyraknoss|us|Mike Giglio|'''Coach/Analyst'''|newteam=AFN}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==See Also== ==External Links== ==References==
